title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics · Cost-Model Clinic: Augmented Trees
summary: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 augmented trees increment in a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain subtree aggregates for rank, select, interval, or range queries.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
